channel.title: qt on Dorin Fodor
channel.description: Recent content in qt on Dorin Fodor

item.title: C++: Using 3rd party libraries
item.description: My first web request While in the very early stages of building Dorin Browser, I got to the point when I had to implement a web request functionality that would let it fetch resources from the internet. Being a total newbie when it comes to C++, I had no idea how to do this. I was still half way through my “The C++ Programming Language” book by Bjarne Stroustrup, and there was no mention yet on how to do this.
